name: PetSaver
problem: Managing pet health and services is highly fragmented—owners must track medications separately while searching across multiple sources for trusted providers.
solution: Engineered a full-stack platform that centralizes medication management and service discovery, creating a more cohesive pet care experience.
keyFeatures: Structured medication tracking system for ongoing treatments
Service discovery with filtering and categorization
Scalable data models for handling pet profiles and care records
Clean, responsive UI focused on usability and accessibility
impact: Reduces friction in managing pet health and services
Bridges the gap between care tracking and service access
Designed as a foundation for scalable pet care solutions

name: Business Dashboard
problem: Retail teams rely on disconnected workflows for sales tracking, staffing, and operational visibility, which makes day-to-day decisions slower and less reliable.
solution: Built a dashboard that consolidates sales performance, staff scheduling, and operations data into one system for faster, data-backed decisions.
impact: Improved visibility into sales and staffing performance from a single dashboard
Reduced context switching between spreadsheets and manual workflows
Created a foundation for more consistent operational planning

name: Amblog
problem: Most blogging platforms are either too simplistic or overly complex, making it difficult for creators to efficiently publish, manage, and scale content.
solution: Built a full-stack content platform with dynamic routing, content management, and optimized rendering, designed to mimic real-world publishing systems.
keyFeatures: Dynamic content publishing and editing system
Responsive, user-friendly interface for seamless reading and writing
Optimized performance for fast page loads and SEO
impact: Designed for scalability and real-world content workflows
Focused on performance and usability to improve user engagement

name: Chou Bot
problem: Manual moderation and role management is time-consuming and inconsistent.
solution: Built scalable automation tools for moderation, logging, and engagement.
impact: Automated role assignment, logging, and user engagement
